message:
fix(core): metrics.rs asupersync-runtime compilation (ft-22x4r)

Fix 3 compilation errors when building metrics module with asupersync:
1. TcpListener::bind requires 'static addr — clone self.bind
2. AsyncReadExt::read() missing in asupersync — add polyfill in
   runtime_compat::io::read() wrapping poll_fn + poll_read
3. TcpStream::shutdown() signature differs — cfg-gate for each runtime

Also adds tokio-side runtime_compat::io::read() for API parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
